name: Michael Selig
why_they_matter: Central federal voice in the jurisdictional conflict over prediction markets.

name: Robert DeNault
why_they_matter: Publicly articulated the operational conflict between state and federal obligations.
suggested_action: Engage on market integrity and conflicting regulatory instructions.

name: Simon Johansen
why_they_matter: Leads one of the clearest institutional prediction-markets build-outs.
suggested_action: Send a focused invitation on liquidity, talent and professionalisation.

name: Moreton Capital prediction-markets leadership
why_they_matter: Building a dedicated strategy and recruiting a senior Portfolio Manager.
suggested_action: Identify team lead and Australia-based candidates.

name: Ivo Crnkovic-Rubsamen
why_they_matter: Building a professional, trader-first prediction venue with fresh institutional backing.
suggested_action: Congratulate him on the raise and invite him to discuss professional exchange design.

name: Matthew Downey
why_they_matter: Brings high-frequency trading and product expertise to Pascal.
suggested_action: Offer a technical market-structure session distinct from Ivo.

why_they_matter: Sits at the intersection of intelligence, journalism, resolution and biotech markets.
suggested_action: Request an exploratory conversation before a formal stage proposal.

name: Silvio Schembri
